technical_seo_services.heading: Our Technical SEO Services
technical_seo_services.subtitle: Comprehensive technical optimisation built for performance, scale, and long-term stability.

services.title: Technical SEO Audits
services.description:
We identify what is broken, bloated, or blocking growth.
This includes crawl analysis, indexation review, site architecture evaluation, log file analysis, and prioritised issue mapping based on impact.

services.title: Site Architecture & Crawl Optimisation
services.description:
We structure your site so search engines and users can navigate it effortlessly.
This includes URL structure, internal linking strategy, crawl depth optimisation, pagination handling, and elimination of orphan pages.

services.title: Core Web Vitals & Page Speed Optimisation
services.description:
Speed is no longer optional.
We optimise LCP, CLS, and INP through performance tuning, asset optimisation, code clean-up, and server-level improvements.
services.imageAlt: Core Web Vitals and page speed optimisation

services.title: Indexation & Crawl Budget Management
services.description:
We control what search engines see and ignore.
This includes robots directives, noindex handling, canonicalisation, XML sitemaps, parameter management, and index bloat reduction.

services.title: Schema & Structured Data
services.description:
We help search engines understand your content.
We implement and validate schema for products, services, FAQs, articles, organisations, reviews, and more to improve SERP visibility.

services.title: Mobile SEO & Technical Compatibility
services.description:
Your site must perform flawlessly on mobile.
We ensure responsive implementation, mobile-first index alignment, and consistency across devices.

services.title: JavaScript SEO
services.description:
Modern frameworks require specialised handling.
We optimise rendering, hydration, and indexing for React, Next.js, Vue, and other JavaScript-heavy environments.

services.title: Website Migrations & SEO Safeguards
services.description:
Technical SEO is critical during change.
We manage redirects, URL mapping, index preservation, and traffic protection during site rebuilds, CMS changes, or domain migrations.

local_seo_services.heading: Our Local SEO Services
local_seo_services.subtitle: End-to-end local optimisation designed to drive measurable local demand.

services.title: Google Business Profile Optimisation
services.description:
Your Google Business Profile is the centre of local visibility.
We optimise categories, services, descriptions, images, posts, Q&A, and engagement signals to maximise map pack visibility and conversions.

services.title: Local Keyword & Search Intent Mapping
services.description:
We identify how real customers search locally.
This includes geo-modified keywords, service-area intent, and high-conversion local queries mapped directly to landing pages and GBP assets.
services.imageAlt: Local keyword and search intent mapping

services.title: Local Landing Pages & On-Page SEO
services.description:
Location relevance must be explicit.
We build and optimise location and service pages that clearly signal geographic relevance while avoiding thin or duplicate content risks.
services.imageAlt: Local landing pages and on-page SEO

services.title: Citation & NAP Consistency
services.description:
Inconsistent data kills trust.
We clean, build, and manage business citations across key directories to reinforce authority and location accuracy.

services.title: Reviews & Reputation Management
services.description:
Reviews are a ranking factor and a conversion factor.
We help you generate, manage, and respond to reviews in a way that improves rankings and customer confidence.

services.title: Local Link Building & Authority Signals
services.description:
Local authority matters.
We build high-quality local backlinks through partnerships, local publications, and industry-relevant placements.
services.imageAlt: Local link building and authority signals

services.title: Multi-Location Local SEO
services.description:
Scaling local visibility requires structure.
We implement frameworks for businesses with multiple branches, franchises, or service areas without cannibalisation or dilution.

services.title: Local SEO Audits & Competitive Analysis
services.description:
We identify exactly why competitors outrank you.
This includes map pack analysis, GBP comparisons, backlink gaps, and local SERP behaviour.
services.imageAlt: Local SEO audits and competitive analysis

seo_audit_services.heading: Our SEO Audit Services
seo_audit_services.subtitle: Comprehensive audits covering every ranking factor that matters.

services.title: Technical SEO Audit
services.description:
We assess how search engines crawl, index, and evaluate your site.
This includes site structure, Core Web Vitals, page speed, mobile usability, crawl errors, indexing issues, schema, internal linking, and technical debt.

services.title: On-Page & Content Audit
services.description:
Content that does not match intent will not rank.
We review page quality, keyword targeting, metadata, internal linking, content depth, duplication risks, and topical relevance.

services.title: Search Intent & Keyword Gap Analysis
services.description:
Ranking for the wrong keywords wastes effort.
We analyse whether your pages align with real search intent and identify missed keyword opportunities your competitors are capturing.
services.imageAlt: Search intent and keyword gap analysis

services.title: Backlink & Authority Audit
services.description:
Authority still matters.
We review backlink quality, anchor text distribution, toxic links, and authority gaps compared to competitors.

services.title: Competitive SEO Analysis
services.description:
We show you why competitors outrank you.
This includes SERP positioning, content strengths, backlink advantages, and structural differences.

services.title: UX & SEO Signals Review
services.description:
Poor UX weakens SEO performance.
We analyse bounce rates, engagement signals, page flow, and conversion blockers that indirectly affect rankings.

services.title: Local SEO Audit (If Applicable)
services.description: For location-based businesses, we assess Google Business Profile, local rankings, citations, reviews, and map pack visibility.

services.title: International SEO Audit (If Applicable)
services.description: For global sites, we review hreflang, geo-targeting, localisation issues, and international indexing risks.

on_page_seo_services.heading: Our On-Page SEO Services
on_page_seo_services.subtitle: Comprehensive optimisation across content, structure, and intent.

services.title: Keyword Mapping & Search Intent Alignment
services.description: We map keywords to pages based on real intent, not volume alone. Each page is aligned to one primary intent with supporting secondary terms, preventing cannibalisation and dilution.

services.title: Content Optimisation
services.description: Content must earn its position. We optimise headings, body copy, structure, and semantic depth to ensure relevance, clarity, and authority without bloating or fluff.

services.title: Meta Titles & Descriptions
services.description: Metadata influences both rankings and click-through rate. We write clean, compelling titles and descriptions that meet length limits, include power terms, and drive qualified clicks.

services.title: Heading Structure & Page Hierarchy
services.description: Poor hierarchy confuses users and search engines. We fix H-tag structure to improve readability, topical clarity, and crawl efficiency.

services.title: Internal Linking Optimisation
services.description: Internal links control authority flow. We optimise anchor text, contextual linking, and page relationships to strengthen priority URLs and support topical clusters.

services.title: Image SEO & Accessibility
services.description: Images affect performance and discoverability. We optimise file names, alt text, compression, and placement to support SEO, accessibility, and page speed.

services.title: URL Structure & Page Clean-Up
services.description: Messy URLs weaken relevance. We clean up URLs, resolve duplication risks, and enforce consistent naming conventions aligned with intent.

services.title: Conversion-Aware On-Page SEO
services.description: Traffic without action is wasted. We align content structure with conversion paths, CTAs, and user flow without harming SEO signals.

off_page_seo_services.heading: Our Off-Page SEO Services
off_page_seo_services.subtitle: Structured authority building designed for scale.

services.title: Strategic Link Building
services.description: We acquire high-quality, contextually relevant backlinks from authoritative sources. Includes industry-specific placements, editorial backlinks, guest contributions, and niche outreach campaigns. No automated networks. No bulk spam links.

services.title: Digital PR & Brand Mentions
services.description: We position your brand in credible publications and relevant platforms. Includes media outreach, thought leadership placements, and branded citation building. This strengthens both SEO and brand visibility.

services.title: Local Citation Building
services.description: For local and regional businesses. Includes consistent NAP citations, directory management, and local authority listings.

services.title: Authority Gap Analysis
services.description: We analyse competitor backlink profiles and identify gaps. Includes link opportunity mapping, anchor strategy review, and competitive authority benchmarking.

services.title: Link Profile Audits & Cleanup
services.description: If your domain has toxic links, we identify and neutralise them. Includes toxic link identification, disavow preparation, and risk mitigation strategy.

e_commerce_seo_services.heading: Our E-Commerce SEO Services
e_commerce_seo_services.subtitle: End-to-end optimisation for scalable online stores.

services.title: Product Page SEO Optimisation
services.description: Product pages win or lose the sale. We optimise titles, descriptions, structured data, internal links, and intent signals so your products rank and convert without duplication or thin content issues.

services.title: Category & Collection Page SEO
services.description: Category pages are your biggest revenue drivers. We optimise structure, copy, and internal linking to ensure they rank for high-volume commercial terms and pass authority to product pages.

services.title: Technical SEO for E-Commerce Platforms
services.description: Online stores create technical debt fast. We fix crawl waste, index bloat, pagination issues, faceted navigation, and Core Web Vitals across Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, and custom builds.

services.title: Faceted Navigation & Filter Control
services.description: Filters help users but confuse search engines. We control indexation, canonicalisation, and crawl paths to prevent SEO damage while preserving usability.

services.title: Internal Linking & Authority Flow
services.description: Most stores waste link equity. We build internal linking systems that push authority toward top-selling categories, seasonal products, and strategic collections.

services.title: Structured Data & Rich Results
services.description: We implement product, review, price, and availability schema to increase visibility and click-through rates in search results.

services.title: International & Multi-Store SEO
services.description: Selling across regions or currencies? We structure stores correctly with hreflang, subfolders or subdomains, and localisation strategies that scale cleanly.

services.title: Conversion-Aware SEO Optimisation
services.description: Traffic without sales is noise. We align SEO structure with conversion paths, merchandising logic, and buyer psychology.

link_building_services.heading: Our Link Building Services
link_building_services.subtitle: Authority-focused link acquisition aligned with your SEO strategy.

services.title: Editorial Link Building
services.description: We earn links from real publications through relevance and value. These links are placed naturally within editorial content and carry strong authority signals that improve rankings without risk.

services.title: Digital PR and Brand Mentions
services.description: We turn brand stories, insights, and data into authoritative mentions and links. This strengthens both SEO performance and brand credibility.

services.title: Contextual Backlinks
services.description: Links are placed within relevant, topically aligned content. Context matters more than metrics alone.

services.title: SaaS and B2B Link Building
services.description: Specialised outreach for SaaS, tech, and B2B businesses. We secure links from industry-relevant platforms that support commercial keywords.

services.title: E-Commerce Link Building
services.description: Product and category-focused link acquisition that supports transactional pages.

services.title: Local and Geo-Relevant Link Building
services.description: For businesses targeting local or regional markets. We build trust signals that support Google Maps visibility and location-based rankings.

services.title: Competitor Backlink Gap Analysis
services.description: We analyse what your competitors rank with and close the authority gap strategically. No guessing. Just data-backed execution.

seo_migration_services.heading: Our SEO Migration Services
seo_migration_services.subtitle: End-to-end migration planning, execution, and validation.

services.title: Website Platform Migration
services.description: Moving between platforms such as WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, custom builds, or headless setups. We ensure SEO signals transfer cleanly without loss.

services.title: Domain Migration
services.description: Changing domains, merging brands, or moving from subdomains to root domains. Handled with strict redirect logic and authority preservation.

services.title: URL Structure Changes
services.description: Restructuring URLs, categories, or site architecture. We prevent indexation errors and ranking volatility.

services.title: Website Redesign SEO Migration
services.description: Design changes often break SEO silently. We align design, development, and SEO so nothing is lost in translation.

services.title: International & Multi-Language SEO Migration
services.description: Complex migrations involving hreflang, regional targeting, and country structures. Handled with careful mapping and validation.

services.title: CMS & Headless SEO Migration
services.description: SEO-safe migrations for modern headless and custom CMS architectures. We manage crawl paths, rendering, and indexing behaviour.

social_media_marketing_services.heading: Our Social Media Marketing Services
social_media_marketing_services.subtitle: End-to-end services designed for clarity, consistency, and scale.

services.title: Social Media Strategy & Positioning
services.description:
We define how your brand shows up, what it says, and who it speaks to.

Includes:
- Platform selection
- Audience and ICP alignment
- Messaging pillars
- Content themes
- Posting cadence

services.title: Content Creation & Publishing
services.description:
High-quality, platform-native content designed to build authority and engagement.

Includes:
- Static posts and carousels
- Short-form content direction
- Branded visuals
- Caption writing
- Hashtag and format optimisation

services.title: B2B Social Media Marketing
services.description:
Social media designed for credibility, not noise.

Ideal for:
- SaaS and technology companies
- Professional services
- Founders and leadership brands
- B2B products and platforms

services.title: Social Media Management
services.description:
We manage the process so you do not have to.

Includes:
- Content calendars
- Scheduling and publishing
- Platform management
- Ongoing optimisation

services.title: Paid Social Advertising
services.description:
Targeted campaigns built to support growth, not burn budget.

Includes:
- Campaign planning
- Audience targeting
- Creative direction
- Funnel alignment

services.title: Analytics & Performance Reporting
services.description:
Clear reporting tied to real outcomes.

Includes:

- Audience growth trends
- Content performance analysis
- Strategic recommendations
